privileged_info_summary: The task involves reordering three Note documents within an OrderedFolder located at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Onboarding-Checklist. The folder is initially populated with documents in incorrect order (Step 3, Step 1, Step 2) and must be reordered to match the expected sequence: Step 1: Preparation, Step 2: Training, Step 3: Assessment. All documents and the folder structure are synthetic, created programmatically via Nuxeo REST API during task setup.
